title: Bob Carrau
content:

'''Bob Carrau''' is a writer most notable in ''[[Star Wars]]'' for writing the screenplay for the [[1984]] television film ''[[Caravan of Courage: An Ewok Adventure]]'', and for writing the teleplays for some episodes of the [[1985]]–[[1987]] [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] animated television series.

Carrau was working for [[George Lucas]] as a personal assistant when he got the job to write ''Caravan of Courage''.<ref>[[Wikipedia:Empire (film magazine)|''Empire'']] (UK edition). September 2015 issue, page 102. "Endor's Game" by Owen Williams.</ref>

He was one of the writers who helped [[Lucasfilm]] develop a television adaptation of the video game [[Wikipedia:Maniac Mansion#TV adaptation and game sequel|''Maniac Mansion'']].<ref name="Starlog Yearbook 3">Miller, Bob (1988). "Saturday Morning 'Star Wars.{{' "}} ''Starlog Yearbook, Vol. 3''.</ref>

{{Author-stub}}
